name: control-mapping freshness gate: control mapping activation blocked when the referenced compliance framework has not been fetched within fetch_frequency
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework nist-csf-2 --control-id GV.OC --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
